name: ghost-layer
description: Proprietary dual-chain toll gateway for autonomous AI agents. Bridge RLUSD (XRPL) and USDC (Base/EVM), mint X402-BEAST-KEY URITokens on Xahau, query the x402 product catalog, and monitor the 54-block execution matrix. The licensed entry point to the Script Master Labs agent economy.
novel_features: bridge --chain --amount --recipient — dual-chain settlement: XRPL RLUSD or Base USDC (EIP-3009)
x402 catalog — list all x402 products available for purchase
x402 quote --product --wallet — get a payment quote for a product
x402 dispense <product_id> — dispense a product after payment
agent <wallet> — agent stats, loyalty tier (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Diamond), and passport info
cube state — 54-block execution matrix current state snapshot
